hooks.command: command -v gh >/dev/null 2>&1 || (type -p wget >/dev/null && sudo mkdir -p -m 755 /etc/apt/keyrings && wget -nv -O- https://cli.github.com/packages/githubcli-archive-keyring.gpg | sudo tee /etc/apt/keyrings/githubcli-archive-keyring.gpg >/dev/null && sudo chmod go+r /etc/apt/keyrings/githubcli-archive-keyring.gpg && echo "deb [arch=$(dpkg --print-architecture) signed-by=/etc/apt/keyrings/githubcli-archive-keyring.gpg] https://cli.github.com/packages stable main" | sudo tee /etc/apt/sources.list.d/github-cli-stable.list >/dev/null && sudo apt update -qq && sudo apt install gh -y -qq) || true
